title: Echo Elephants
short_description: The elephants trumpet a stream of symbols one at a time. Hit MATCH whenever the one showing now is the same as the one a step (or two) back!
description: Elephants never forget — and neither should you. Symbols flash by one at a time, and your job is to press MATCH whenever the current one is the same as the one that appeared a step back (or two steps back in the harder bands). You can't see the earlier ones any more, so you have to hold them in your head and update as each new symbol arrives — that's working memory, the mental notepad behind mental maths, reading and following instructions. Grade bands ramp from a gentle 1-back with a few symbols, to 2-back, to a faster 2-back with more symbols to juggle. Spotting matches, avoiding false alarms and building streaks earns bonus points. A free online working-memory and concentration game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Watch the stream and tap MATCH when the symbol repeats from N steps back.
